sections.body_en: Passed all exams with the same character Follow the guide for Stamp of Approval first. After completing the Children's Examination, wait for a Provincial Examination to start, and enter it. Upon easily passing this one too, focus on improving your Learning and Confucian Education by using the Study scheme, getting a Mentor via the Request Mentorship interaction, and getting Perks from the Learning Lifestyle. Once the Emperor starts a Capital Examination, enter it. Pass all Exams with one character
